description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust:latest Docker image for all jobs. Add a build:stable job (default stage) that runs `rustc --version && cargo --version`, then `cargo build --all`, and finally `cargo test --all --verbose`. Add a pages job (default stage) that runs only on the master branch, uses the same rust:latest image, executes `cd library && cargo doc && cd ..` followed by `mv target/doc/ public/`, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. No services, caches, or additional variables are needed.
